test.name: Irish famine migration context for 1840s Pennsylvania
test.description: Provide historical context for Irish immigration to Pennsylvania coal country in the 1840s-1850s.

input.user_message: What historical context should I know about Irish immigration to Schuylkill County, Pennsylvania in the 1840s?

additional_criteria: Should mention the Great Famine (1845-1852) as the primary driver of Irish emigration in this period
Should note that Schuylkill County was an anthracite coal mining region that attracted Irish laborers
